title: Employee Referral Program and Bonus Policy
text:
Q: What is the Employee Referral Program and how does the bonus policy work?
A: Our Employee Referral Program encourages employees to refer qualified candidates for open positions within the company. If your referral is hired and successfully completes 90 days of employment, you will receive a bonus of $1,000. To participate, please submit your referral through the Employee Referral Portal located on the HR intranet. Ensure that your referral is aware of the application and that they mention your name during the application process. Bonuses are processed in the payroll cycle following the completion of the 90-day period. For any questions or further details, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember, there is no limit to the number of referrals you can make, so feel free to refer as many qualified candidates as you like!
